response: Based in Austin, TX, Acme Corp employs 342 people and achieved a total annual revenue of $54.4M, representing an 18% year-over-year growth. Quarterly revenue fluctuated throughout the year, starting at $12.3M in Q1, rising to $14.1M in Q2, dipping to $11.8M in Q3, and peaking at $16.2M in Q4.
